meeting_notes: Institutional client — Municipio de Los Cabos. Decision-making involves committee approval process, not individual. Project has approved budget and public mandate. Procurement follows obra pública guidelines.
rationale: Strong institutional project with approved budget and public mandate. Organizational decision-making may lengthen approval cycles. Recommend advancing.

institutional_notes.fit_score_note: Scores reflect institutional context. decision_clarity of 4 reflects known approval cycle complexity, not uncertainty about project viability.
